description: Install dependencies and verify baseline tests pass before making changes.
steps: Run `npm install` in /projects/sandbox/cdk-sleep-ts-kiro to install all dependencies.
Run `npx jest` to confirm all existing tests pass.
Run `npx cdk synth` to confirm CloudFormation synthesis succeeds.
acceptance_criteria: All existing tests pass with exit code 0
cdk synth produces a valid CloudFormation template without errors
verification: npx jest passes with all tests green
npx cdk synth completes without errors
findings: NODE_OPTIONS env var has --require /opt/amazon/kiro-agent/proxy-bootstrap.js which does not exist. Must prefix commands with NODE_OPTIONS='' to avoid MODULE_NOT_FOUND errors. All 27 existing tests pass. cdk synth succeeds cleanly.
